'''Moegid''' was a [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]].

==Biography==
In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], Moegid accompanied [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], and [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] on their mission to find [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. Using the unique Verpine bio-frequencies, he controlled Lobot from onboard Lando's personal starship, the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']], using him to slice into Imperial files looking for a copy of the [[Caamas Document]]. This plan failed when Imperials realized the nature of the plot, and began scanning Verpine frequencies. Calrissian and Solo were eventually captured, but later freed.

{{Char-stub}}
